film.title: Patthar Ke Phool
film.overview: Suraj falls in love with Kiran and doesn't know that she is the daughter of an underworld kingpin. Suraj's life takes a drastic turn when the same criminal kills his father.

dialogues.dialogue: Dad, you know very well....for this world....you're an unsuccessful man. Shut up! Aren't you ashamed to talk rubbish? Ungrateful boy! If you utter a word more, I'll pull your tongue. -Wait.
Yes. Are you mad? Aren't you ashamed to accuse my father? I know you're hut, but..Stop, Suraj. I don't want to talk to you. Listen to me. -Don't touch me.

If you take this right from me....my aim will be unfulﬁlled. You shouldn't meet Balraj Khanna and his family. Aren't you ashamed to accuse father? Today the police department gave me a ﬁle....which has records of your....crimes and my father's murder. I'm sure you did this murder.

With your blessings, I want to become a big and good man. Today you say with love that Suraj is our son. I want that you should say this with pride one day. I gave you many sorrows. Today I'm doing the same. Please forgive me.
dialogues.cause_raw: becoming a big and good man
